title: Atomtronics
body: Atomtronics is an emerging field concerning the quantum technology of matter-wave circuits which coherently guide propagating ultra-cold atoms. The systems typically include components analogous to those found in electronics, quantum electronics or optical systems; such as beam splitters, transistors, and atomic counterparts of superconducting quantum interference devices (SQUIDs). Applications range from studies of fundamental physics to the development of practical devices that extenuate towards the usage of quantum superfluids for the computational modeling techniques of large quantitative models for artificial general intelligence, upon which are implicated from research advancements through various computational techniques; quantum science.
